2605.06068.title: VibeServe: Can AI Agents Build Bespoke LLM Serving Systems?
2605.06068.paper_summary: For years, we have built LLM serving systems like any other critical infrastructure: a single general-purpose stack, hand-tuned over many engineer-years, meant to support every model and workload. In this paper, we take the opposite bet: a multi-agent loop that automatically synthesizes bespoke serving systems for different usage scenarios. We propose VibeServe, the first agentic loop that generates entire LLM serving stacks end-to-end. VibeServe uses an outer loop to plan and track the search over system designs, and an inner loop to implement candidates, check correctness, and measure performance on the target benchmark. In the standard deployment setting, where existing stacks are highly optimized, VibeServe remains competitive with vLLM, showing that generation-time specialization need not come at the cost of performance. More interestingly, in non-standard scenarios, VibeServe outperforms existing systems by exploiting opportunities that generic systems miss in six scenarios involving non-standard model architectures, workload knowledge, and hardware-specific optimizations. Together, these results suggest a different point in the design space for infrastructure software: generation-time specialization rather than runtime generality. Code is available at https://github.com/uw-syfi/vibe-serve.
2605.06068.paper_summary_zh: 多年來，我們像其他關鍵基礎設施一樣建立了 LLM 服務系統：一個經過多年的工程調整的單一通用堆疊，旨在支持每個模型和工作負載。<lb/>在本文中，我們採取相反的策略：一個多代理循環，自動合成針對不同使用場景的定制服務系統。<lb/>我們提出了 VibeServe，第一個生成整個 LLM 服務堆疊的代理循環。<lb/>VibeServe 使用外部循環來規劃和跟踪系統設計的搜索，並使用內部循環來實現候選者、檢查正確性以及在目標基準上測量性能。<lb/>在標準部署設置中，現有堆疊經過高度優化，VibeServe 仍然與 vLLM 競爭，顯示生成時的專門化不必以性能為代價。<lb/>更有趣的是，在非標準場景中，VibeServe 通過利用通用系統在涉及非標準模型架構、工作負載知識和硬體特定優化的六種場景中錯過的機會，超越了現有系統。<lb/>綜合這些結果，建議基礎設施軟體設計空間中的不同觀點：生成時的專門化而不是運行時的通用性。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/uw-syfi/vibe-serve 獲得。
2605.06068.author: Keisuke Kamahori et.al.
2605.06068.authors: Keisuke Kamahori, Shihang Li, Simon Peter, Baris Kasikci
